ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genetic_variations" (
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genetic variation */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the variation is located */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the variation on the chromosome */,
  "ref_allele" TEXT /* Reference allele */,
  "alt_allele" TEXT /* Alternative allele */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the genetic variation data */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the genetic variation */,
  "clinical_significance" TEXT /* Clinical significance of the genetic variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcription_factors" (
  "tf_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcription factor */,
  "tf_name" TEXT /* Name of the transcription factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transcription factor's role */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Gene ID associated with the transcription factor */,
  "uniprot_id" TEXT /* Uniprot ID of the transcription factor protein */,
  "function" TEXT /* Function of the transcription factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tf_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cell_types" (
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cell type */,
  "cell_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the cell type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cell type */,
  "cell_line" TEXT /* Cell line name */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Tissue type associated with the cell type */,
  "disease_status" TEXT /* Disease status of the cell type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variation_tf_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic variation */,
  "tf_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcription factor */,
  "association_type" TEXT /* Type of association between the genetic variation and transcription factor */,
  "evidence_code" TEXT /* Evidence code supporting the association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variation_tf_associations_tf_id FOREIGN KEY ("tf_id") REFERENCES transcription_factors ("tf_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variation_tf_associations_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES genetic_variations ("variation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variation_cell_associations" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic variation */,
  "cell_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cell type */,
  "expression_level" TEXT /* Expression level of the genetic variation in the cell type */,
  "regulation_type" TEXT /* Type of regulation exerted by the genetic variation on the cell type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variation_cell_associations_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES genetic_variations ("variation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variation_cell_associations_cell_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_type_id") REFERENCES cell_types ("cell_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "effect_sizes" (
  "effect_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the effect size record */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genetic variation */,
  "effect_size_ref" REAL /* Effect size for the reference allele */,
  "effect_size_alt" REAL /* Effect size for the alternative allele */,
  "statistical_significance" REAL /* Statistical significance of the effect size */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the effect size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_effect_sizes_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES genetic_variations ("variation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_provenance" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date of dataset creation */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date of dataset modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., heatmap, scatterplot) */,
  "variation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated genetic variation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_variation_id FOREIGN KEY ("variation_id") REFERENCES genetic_variations ("variation_id")
)
